title: From Asansör to Karataş
description: Spend a themed day in Izmir: visit the Izmir Historical Elevator, stroll down Dario Moreno Street, stop by Karataş Tram Stop, and relax at Hoi Coffee and Plants.
notes: Take in the views of the gulf from above.
Snap a photo on the begonville staircase street.
Finish the day with a peaceful walk along the shoreline.
Take a breather at the local café in the neighborhood.
There's a free public restroom near the coastal area.
